de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile

Class SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractProfile
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.JavaProfile
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile.SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Profile

    public class SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile
extends JavaProfile
    An extended JavaProfile used by the symbolic execution API.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      The used StrategyFactory of the SymbolicExecutionStrategy.
      private Boolean truthValueEvaluationEnabled
      true truth value evaluation is enabled, false truth value evaluation is disabled.

    • Field Detail

      • NAME

        public static final String NAME
        The Name of this Profile.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION_FACTORY

        private static final StrategyFactory SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION_FACTORY
        The used StrategyFactory of the SymbolicExecutionStrategy.

      • truthValueEvaluationEnabled

        private final Boolean truthValueEvaluationEnabled
        true truth value evaluation is enabled, false truth value evaluation is disabled.

      • defaultInstance

        public static SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile defaultInstance

        The default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

      • defaultInstanceWithTruthValueEvaluation

        public static SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile defaultInstanceWithTruthValueEvaluation

        The default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

      • isPredicateEvaluationEnabled

        public boolean isPredicateEvaluationEnabled()
        Checks if predicate evaluation is enabled or not.
        Returns:
        true predicate evaluation is enabled, false predicate evaluation is disabled.

      • getDefaultInstance

        public static SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile getDefaultInstance()

        Returns the default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

        Returns:
        The default instance for usage in the Thread of the user interface.

      • getDefaultInstance

        public static SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile getDefaultInstance(boolean truthValueEvaluationEnabled)

        Returns the default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

        Parameters:
        truthValueEvaluationEnabled - true truth value evaluation is enabled, false truth value evaluation is disabled.
        Returns:
        The default instance for usage in the Thread of the user interface.

      • isTruthValueTracingEnabled

        public static boolean isTruthValueTracingEnabled(Proof proof)
        Checks if truth value evaluation is enabled in the given Proof.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to check.
        Returns:
        true truth value evaluation is enabled, false truth value evaluation is disabled.

      • isTruthValueEvaluationEnabled

        public static boolean isTruthValueEvaluationEnabled(InitConfig initConfig)
        Checks if truth value evaluation is enabled in the given InitConfig.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - The InitConfig to check.
        Returns:
        true truth value evaluation is enabled, false truth value evaluation is disabled.

      • isTruthValueEvaluationEnabled

        public static boolean isTruthValueEvaluationEnabled(Profile profile)
        Checks if predicate evaluation is enabled in the given Profile.
        Parameters:
        profile - The Profile to check.
        Returns:
        true predicate evaluation is enabled, false predicate evaluation is disabled.
